applied: Replaced rigid setting grids with auto-fit/minmax responsive grids.
Added stable min-width and overflow guards for panels, setting cards, metrics, and radar area.
Improved Korean label wrapping to avoid clipped or uneven text at mid widths.
Added mobile breakpoints for two-column and one-column setting layouts.
Preserved existing calculation and DB behavior.
